connections.notes: Accessible from Route 41 by using Whirlpool. warp_event 5,13 ROUTE_41 4.

warps.notes: Staircase descending to B1F (south entrance). warp_event 5,3 WHIRL_ISLAND_B1F 6.

tile_layout.notes: Schematic from warp coordinates in WhirlIslandSE.asm. 10x18 tiles. Only one staircase to B1F at (5,3). Exit to Route 41 at (5,13). The SE cave is the simplest entrance — a single corridor with one staircase and no internal connections to other entrance caves. No items. Actual block layout in maps/WhirlIslandSE.blk.

cave.notes: Standard 7-slot cave encounter table. Same composition as other entrance caves. Tileset attr $0f (differs from NW/NE/SW which use $09). Source: data/wild/johto_grass.asm def_grass_wildmons WHIRL_ISLAND_SE lines 957-983.

water.notes: No water encounter table defined for WHIRL_ISLAND_SE in johto_water.asm. No surfable pools present.

fishing.notes: Uses FISHGROUP_WHIRL_ISLANDS per maps.asm. No accessible fishing spots in this small entrance cave.

good_rod.notes: time_group 18: Horsea lv20 day and night

super_rod.notes: time_group 19: Horsea lv40 day and night

events.description: Player must use HM06 Whirlpool to access this island from Route 41. The SE entrance is the simplest — only one staircase with no secondary connections.

notes: Southeast entrance to the Whirl Islands complex. The simplest of the four entrance caves: 5 blocks wide (10 tiles), 9 blocks tall (18 tiles). Only one staircase at (5,3) leads to B1F, and the exit to Route 41 is at (5,13). No items, no trainers, no internal cross-cave passages. Tileset attribute $0f (same as Lugia Chamber) rather than $09 used by the other three entrances. Wild encounter table is identical in species to NW/NE/SW but Seel are absent from night slots (replaced by Golbat). Source: maps/WhirlIslandSE.asm, constants/map_constants.asm line 135, data/maps/attributes.asm line 448, data/wild/johto_grass.asm lines 957-983.
